name: 📊 NEXUS - Daily Sales Report + AI + Backup v3 FULL
description: Cron daily 23:00 - aggregates paid orders, generates Gemini executive summary, emails admin, backs up to CSV via Postgres

parameters.query: SELECT DATE("date") as day, SUM(total) as revenue, COUNT(*) as orders, COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as customers FROM "Order" WHERE status = 'paid' AND DATE("date") = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY DATE("date")

parameters.body: {"contents":[{"parts":[{"text":"Create a beautiful, professional markdown executive summary for NEXUS daily sales report. Data: Revenue={{ $json[0].revenue || 0 }}€, Orders={{ $json[0].orders || 0 }}, Customers={{ $json[0].customers || 0 }}. Include: 1) Key metrics highlight, 2) Three actionable insights, 3) One prediction for tomorrow, 4) One recommendation. Format as email-ready HTML table + paragraphs. Keep to 200 words."}]}]}

parameters.subject: =📊 NEXUS Daily Sales Report - {{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}
parameters.html:
=

NEXUS Daily Sales Report

Date: {{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}

Revenue: {{ $('Daily Aggregate').item.json.revenue || 0 }}€

Orders: {{ $('Daily Aggregate').item.json.orders || 0 }}

Customers: {{ $('Daily Aggregate').item.json.customers || 0 }}

AI Executive Summary

{{ $json.text || 'No summary available.' }}

parameters.query: COPY (SELECT id, userId, status, total, date FROM "Order" WHERE status = 'paid' AND DATE("date") = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY date DESC) TO STDOUT WITH CSV HEADER
